evidence_required: foreman-reanchor.yml resolves active manifest via .admin/prs/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.json with .admin/pr.json legacy fallback
foreman-reanchor.yml posts full governance instructions only when manifest requires IAA/ECAP
handover-claim-gate.yml resolves active manifest via .admin/prs/pr-${PR_NUMBER}.json with .admin/pr.json legacy fallback
handover-claim-gate.yml detects handover/merge-ready keywords in PR comments and on ready_for_review events
handover-claim-gate.yml posts HANDOVER BLOCKED comment when required checks are failing, pending, or missing (never ran); edits existing gate comment instead of creating a new one (idempotency guard)
preflight-evidence-gate.yml enforces gate-changing PR rule: PRs touching .github/workflows/ or .github/scripts/ must include test evidence
